verbGlossary.LINKS TO: Direct foreign-key or {target}-ID linkage between a field record and a schedule entity
verbGlossary.TRACKS PROGRESS ON: {source} entry records completion status or work-in-place against {target}d activity
verbGlossary.VALIDATES AGAINST: {source} actual is compared to the planned {target} value to check conformance
verbGlossary.REPORTS ON: {source} or field report documents the status of {target} element
verbGlossary.RECORDED ON: {source} entry is time-stamped relative to {target} data date for period alignment
verbGlossary.REPORTS STATUS OF: {source} entry communicates the current state of {target} or activity
verbGlossary.DESCRIBES CAUSE OF: Free-text field note explains the root cause behind {target} delay classification
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS STAFFING FOR: {source} verifies that required crews are mobilized for upcoming look-ahead {target}s
verbGlossary.INFORMS: {source} data provides input that shapes {target} planning or leveling decision
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source}assignment is allocated to a specific {target}d activity
verbGlossary.ROTATES THROUGH: Crew cycles through repetitive zones in a takt-time or linear {target}
verbGlossary.LOGS HOURS ON: {source} captures actual hours worked against {target}d activity
verbGlossary.ACTUALS COMPARED TO: {source}-recorded actual usage is compared to {target}-loaded planned quantity
verbGlossary.FEEDS ACTUALS TO: {source} production data provides the actual values for earned-{target} calculation
verbGlossary.LOGS EQUIPMENT ON: {source} entry records machinery used on {target}d activity
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED UNDER: {source}record is planned for deployment under {target} loading plan
verbGlossary.DELAYS: {source}-logged event causes {target}d activity to start or finish later than planned
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED UNDER: {source} delay, weather, or safety event is categorized within {target} delay taxonomy
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} event initiates {target} analysis, time claim, or recovery action
verbGlossary.SUPPORTS CLAIM FOR: {source} delay record provides documentary evidence for a time-extension request
verbGlossary.CONSUMES: Delay event uses up available {target} on affected activities
verbGlossary.EVIDENCES: {source} serves as factual evidence for a retrospective delay or impact analysis
verbGlossary.PUSHES: {source} delay forces {target} date later than the current planned date
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS NEED FOR: {source} disruption creates the requirement for a recovery {target} or acceleration plan
verbGlossary.SUSPENDS WORK ON: Weather or site condition halts production on {target}d activity for the day
verbGlossary.MARKS NON-WORK DAY ON: Weather event flags a calendar day as non-productive for {target} calculation
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: Cumulative field events add up to measurable {target} erosion or schedule degradation
verbGlossary.DEGRADES: Repeated field disruptions lower the overall {target} health score
verbGlossary.INCREASES: High delay frequency raises the ratio of critical activities in {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURES OUTPUT ON: {source} quantifies units of work installed on {target}d activity
verbGlossary.UPDATES PROGRESS OF: {source} production data advances the percent-complete of {target}d activity duration
verbGlossary.FEEDS PERFORMANCE TO: Productivity data flows into earned-{target} or performance-index calculations
verbGlossary.ADVANCES: Installed quantity moves the activity progress forward in {target}
verbGlossary.VALIDATES QUANTITIES AGAINST: {source} quantity is cross-checked against the cost-loaded {target} quantities
verbGlossary.PLANNED UNDER: Budgeted target is established within {target} as the planned benchmark
verbGlossary.DRIVES: {source} productivity performance directly influences {target} performance index
verbGlossary.MEASURED AGAINST: {source} productivity is evaluated relative to {target} execution expectations
verbGlossary.ENABLES: Delivery or material receipt removes a procurement constraint allowing {target} to start
verbGlossary.SATISFIES: Material arrival fulfills {target} such as finish-to-start on procurement
verbGlossary.ENABLES START OF: Material shipment arrival allows the dependent {target}d activity to begin
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS READINESS FOR: {source} confirms that look-ahead {target}s have the materials needed to proceed
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS REVISION OF: Plan revision receipt forces {target} to incorporate design changes
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS CHANGE IN: Plan revision or field event initiates a tracked {target} change entry
verbGlossary.LOGGED AGAINST: {source} such as T&M ticket is associated with {target}d activity or change event
verbGlossary.STOPS WORK ON: {source} halts production on {target} until the hazard is corrected
verbGlossary.SHUTS DOWN: Serious accident forces a full work stoppage on the affected {target} or area
verbGlossary.GATES: Inspection must pass before the next {target}d activity can begin
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BEFORE: {source} is a prerequisite that must be completed before {target} is achieved
verbGlossary.SUMMARIZES PROGRESS FOR: {source} rolls up field data into {target}-update narrative
verbGlossary.TRACKS COMPLETION OF: {source} report monitors {target} completion status against the planned date
verbGlossary.ADDS UNPLANNED HOURS TO: T&M labor entry records extra hours beyond {target}-loaded plan
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED ON: Assignment is placed on a specific look-ahead {target} period
verbGlossary.REQUESTS LABOR FOR: {source} identifies staffing needs to support {target}-loaded labor requirements
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} is limited by the resource-leveling constraints in {target}
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED WITH: {source} is sent out alongside the look-ahead {target} to stakeholders
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source} metric statistically moves in tandem with {target} health or performance metric
verbGlossary.MIRRORS: Plan Percent Complete from field operations reflects the same metric as {target} Percent Plan Complete
verbGlossary.MEASURES RELIABILITY OF: {source} PPC metric measures the reliability of weekly commitments in the Last Planner System
verbGlossary.VALIDATES PEAK OF: Peak daily headcount from the field validates the resource-leveling peak in {target}
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS AGAINST: {source} is compared to {target} planned labor loading curve
verbGlossary.TRACED BACK TO: {source} change is traced to its originating field delay or disruption event
verbGlossary.RECONSTRUCTED FROM: As-built {target} dates are derived from daily log records of actual start and finish
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: {source} delay analysis references field weather or condition logs as evidence
verbGlossary.SETS TARGETS FOR: {target} establishes the planned production targets that field will measure against
verbGlossary.DEMANDS ADDITIONAL: {source}plan requires additional equipment mobilization logged in the field
verbGlossary.EXPLAINED IN: {source}is documented and justified in field log narratives
verbGlossary.CALIBRATED BY: {source}rates are calibrated using actual field productivity data
verbGlossary.EXPORTS TO: CPM scheduling tool pushes {target} data to the field-operations scheduled work linkage
verbGlossary.COMPARED TO: {source} metric is placed side-by-side with its {target}-planned counterpart for variance analysis
